name: Thunderous Greatclub
description:
While you are attuned to this magic weapon, your Strength is 20 unless your Strength is already equal to or greater than that score. The weapon deals an extra {@damage 1d8} Thunder damage to any creature it hits and an extra {@damage 3d8} Thunder damage to objects it hits that aren't being worn or carried.
The weapon has the following additional properties.
